# Ashok Pasala

> Ashok Pasala is a Full Stack Developer, AI Systems Engineer, and the founder of Norveth. He is a Computer Science student at VIT-AP University (B.Tech CSE, Class of 2028), based in Andhra Pradesh, India. He builds production-ready web applications, scalable backend platforms, AI automation systems, and multi-agent orchestration frameworks.

## Identity

- Full name: Ashok Pasala (also known as Ashok Raj Pasala)
- Roles: Full Stack Developer, AI Systems Engineer, AI Automation Builder, Systems Architect, Founder of Norveth
- Education: Bachelor of Technology, Computer Science & Engineering, VIT-AP University, Andhra Pradesh, India (expected graduation 2028)
- Location: Andhra Pradesh, India
- Status: Available for freelance, consulting, collaborations, and open source
- Website: https://ashokpasala.vercel.app
- Email: ashokashishms@gmail.com
- Business email (Norveth): founder@norveth.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/ashokwebs
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ashok-raj-p-1b8539317/
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/ashokfounds
- Devpost: https://devpost.com/ashokashishms/

## Norveth

Ashok Pasala is the founder and systems architect of Norveth, an engineering-first technology initiative focused on building intelligent software, AI automation platforms, developer infrastructure, cybersecurity tooling, and scalable digital products. Its long-term vision is to develop production-grade AI systems, autonomous business software, developer tools, and enterprise platforms.

## Core Expertise

- Artificial Intelligence: AI agents, multi-agent systems, LLM applications, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), prompt engineering, vector search, workflow automation
- Full Stack Development: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend Engineering: Node.js, Express, FastAPI, Django, REST APIs, GraphQL, WebSockets, microservices, API design, authentication systems
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, SQLite, Supabase, Prisma ORM, vector databases
- Languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, C, C++, SQL, Bash, Rust, Go
- DevOps & Infrastructure: Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, AWS, Nginx, Terraform
- Cybersecurity: Linux hardening, network security, OWASP, cryptography, vulnerability assessment, security research
- Blockchain & Web3: Solidity, smart contracts, Ethereum, Web3.js, Ethers.js, on-chain analysis

## Featured Projects

- Multi-Agent Orchestration Platform: AI orchestration framework where specialized agents collaborate to execute complex workflows autonomously (Python, FastAPI, LangChain, Redis)
- AI Workflow Automation Dashboard: Visual workflow builder for AI-powered business automation (Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker)
- Personal Knowledge Engine: Semantic search engine powered by embeddings and RAG (Python, ChromaDB, OpenAI, Streamlit)
- SaaS Analytics Platform: Analytics dashboard with user tracking, funnels, and real-time events (Next.js, Express, MongoDB, WebSockets)
- OSPRED Security Framework: Experimental AI-assisted cybersecurity platform for security automation and vulnerability research (Python, FastAPI, Docker)
- API Integration Framework: Reusable API orchestration framework for scalable integrations (Node.js, Redis, TypeScript)
- ShadowForge Crypto Intelligence: Research platform for blockchain intelligence and cryptographic security analysis (Python, FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL)
- DeFi Portfolio Tracker: Blockchain portfolio aggregation dashboard (React, Web3.js, Ethers.js)

## Experience

- Founder & Systems Architect, Norveth (2024–present)
- Independent Full Stack Developer (2024–present): full-stack applications, backend APIs, database design, AI automation workflows, SaaS platforms, developer tooling
- Technical Researcher (2023–present): AI systems, multi-agent systems, distributed systems, cybersecurity, Web3, backend architecture
- Technical Writer (ongoing): technical notes, engineering essays, software documentation

## Services

Full stack development, backend and API development, AI automation and agent development, SaaS and dashboard development, system architecture and technical consulting, developer tooling and rapid prototyping.

## Philosophy

Build systems, not just software. Core principles: simplicity over unnecessary abstraction, automation wherever possible, performance through thoughtful architecture, security by design, long-term maintainability, and engineering with measurable impact.

- [Home](https://ashokpasala.vercel.app): Portfolio home — about, expertise, tech stack, featured projects, experience, services, and contact
